log: REASONING: ROUND 1: 3 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:19+3=22 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:5+-2=3 vs DC 15] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:2+-2=0 vs DC 15] FAIL!

--- Siren — Armored Escapist --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 20 | Conc: Hypnotic Pattern
REASONING: Concentrating on Hypnotic Pattern. Vicious Mockery on Frost Giant (disadvantage protects concentration).
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 15 WIS save on Frost Giant.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:18+3=21 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. No effect.
REASONING: Throwing rock at Siren — Armored Escapist (distant).
→ Rock: [d20:16+9=25 vs AC 20] HIT! 23 damage. Siren — Armored Escapist HP: 36/59
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Hypnotic Pattern ends!
REASONING: Can't reach melee (45ft). Javelin at Siren — Armored Escapist.
